feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: should i play games?
entry.content: should i play games?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: i was looking at the cast from fringe so i clicked onto that hot lil mulatta act…
entry.content: i was looking at the cast from fringe so i clicked onto that hot lil mulatta actress' profile and thus found the tranniest movie ever conceived
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Games fucking suck now vros. All engines are now unreal or unity. Budgets all go…
entry.content: Games fucking suck now vros. All engines are now unreal or unity. Budgets all go to marketing. Writing is ass. Mechanics are homogenous and padded out with bullshit like crafting and building. Everything is fucking woke. Indie games fucking suck ass. All the same problems are worse. Sure they don’t have mtx but I almost wish they would. Their writing is always ass. Their art is always ass. Game length will be 35 minutes and early access for 9 years and then release when it finally has 2 hours an
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Everyone in this thread is now teleported to Sonic 06. If you die in it you die …
entry.content: Everyone in this thread is now teleported to Sonic 06. If you die in it you die irl. Only if another anon beats the level is Everyone of their respective levels revived. Roll to see what level you will be teleported to: 0 - Wave Ocean 1 - Dusty Desert 3. White Acropolis 4. Crisis City 5. Flame Core 6. Radical Train 7. Kingdom Valley 8. Tropical Jungle 9. Aquatic Base 10. End of the World
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: how come nobody told me he died?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: arguments against not being retro: >hd 1080i resolutions >hard drive bay and usb…
entry.content: arguments against not being retro: >hd 1080i resolutions >hard drive bay and usb ports >online gaming >most popular games include gta, fifa, gow >paid subscriptions >99% of games controlled with 2 sticks in a 3d environment arguments for it being retro: >ps2 is retro b-because...um....i'm a zoomer shitskin that grew up with it and need my childhood to be validated!!!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Creating a formel for propability in randomness and running it on a computer is …
entry.content: Creating a formel for propability in randomness and running it on a computer is like simulating Logos, then they call it LLM and market it as AI. There will never be ASI or AGI, we never created AI at all.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why isn't Windows being decompiled so it's less shitty?
entry.content: We see all this talk of people decompiling Gamecube games and such with Fable and what not, but what about decompiling explorer.exe from Windows 10 LTSC 2021 to make a replacement so that the start menu doesn't have a 1 second delay when opening? I pretty sure it opened instantly in Windows 7. Or how about using Fable on Firefox source code so that Firefox stops leaking memory?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: are they just not gonna release rtx 60 series?
entry.content: are they just not gonna release rtx 60 series?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Blue LED lights in techbology
entry.content: >Look for fucking basic surge protector in 2026 >They fucking ALL have blue or green LED lights on them >Maybe the non aliexpress brands? >NOPE. All LEDs! What the fuck is wrong with manufacturers now? I want an outlet for my bedroom. I don't want to have to pop open the shell of every fucking device I have and physically remove the LED just so it's not beaming my room at night when I'm trying to fucking sleep. Every device just needs to have an always fucking on blue LED now, and sometimes it's
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /p4k/ - Nightly Pitchfork Countdown Hypetrain Thread
entry.content: Fellow Pitchfork patricians, it is once again the time for our nightly countdown for Pitchfork's new reviews to be updated on the site at 1am eastern time. 10.0? 0.0? Best New Music? Best New Reissue? 8.0+ with no BNM? A shitty set of 7's and below? Weird Al's eternal BNM incoming hypetrain! Noctourniquetcourtsney Barnett Review? Ian FUCKIN' Cohen? Ryan "THE TASTEMAKER" Dombal? Jayson "8.7" Greene? Lindsay "qt feminist" Zoladz? [retired patrician, memory lives on forever] Brandon Meme Metal Stos
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >band named after someone else's song >band never makes anything as good as that…

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Has Aprilia left its patchy reliability history in the past?
entry.content: Ive seen tons of reviewers saying the same thing these days about how aprilia reliability has turned the corner and is now much better than it was 20 yrs ago. Im not going to say its up there with kawasaki suzuki honda and bmw, but i think its good enough for the current reputation of aprilia reliability to be “generally solid”. Ppl have occasional niggles with aprilias here and there, even on the tuareg which might be aprilias most reliable bike ever, but the majority of aprilias that leave the
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Bruh, where the fuck is my anti-air mosquito laser? I've been promised two such …
entry.content: Bruh, where the fuck is my anti-air mosquito laser? I've been promised two such devices, but both failed to come to fruition. There are so many fucking mosquitoes in my area this summer.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is it possible to kind of upgrade the gpu board on Thinkpad P16 Gen 2? (from 3500 ada to 5000 ada)
entry.content: In a way, structure of a Thinkpad P16 Gen 2 RTX 3500 Ada is identical, i presume the major issue would be the BIOS. I know that it is recommended to only change the gpu with the model you had before, but still there's should be a way to do it theoratically.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Whats the point of continuing to play this series when you started with 0? Its c…
entry.content: Whats the point of continuing to play this series when you started with 0? Its clear that it absolutely peaked with this one and everything after feels half baked and inferior to it on all fronts. I'm more interested in play og 1 and 2 and skip to 7 after having forced myself throug k1, k2 and og 3.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is it worth switching to linux?
entry.content: Linux users, is it worth switching from Windows to a distro? I don't have the time or patience to tinker with everything, and I prefer something that works right out of the box; unfortunately, I'm just an average Joe with an IQ of 83. Is it worth switching, or should I just stick with Windows? (I have an Nvidia GPU)
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: should I do it bros? good deal or no?
entry.content: should I do it bros? good deal or no?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 1955
entry.content: It was the only year in American history in which NOBODY made a bad looking automobile. Not even Hudson or DeSoto had a bad outing. It was a hopeful time. More displacement every year. 10 cent gas. Buying a new car every two years. Truly the peak of quality of life for the American working man. But you probably prefer a different year. So what year do you consider peak?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Is she the modern Helen of Troy?
entry.content: Is she the modern Helen of Troy?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Life And Times
entry.content: I think this album holds up, love the off the grid feeling, weird slow parts and dragging rhythms, lots of space between the instruments, neat way some of the guitar lines go with the melodies, great drum parts, distorted bass riffs, just a lot of cool stuff going on I think this album stuck with me more than any of Shiner’s work for some reason https://thelifeandtimes.bandcamp.co m/album/no-one-loves-you-like-i-do
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Dark Themes hidden in plain sight in video games
entry.content: Pontiff basically violated Dancer in ways that can't be imagined. >she was a descendent of royalty, but we don't know her name identity loss >she was given a royal outfit and forced to dance and entertain Pontiff and the Boreal Valley humiliation, degradation and rape >given a ring, which will eventually turn her into a monster mindbreak, loss of humanity, fate SIGNIFICANTLY worse than death
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I'm not going to lie. I wanted to hate it because: "Bazinga!" but it's actually …
entry.content: I'm not going to lie. I wanted to hate it because: "Bazinga!" but it's actually a really cozy show. I wish it had kept going and just ignored the Big Bang Theory, it was just getting good at the end.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The Fatal Flaw of 4x games, accompanied by its delusional fanbase.
entry.content: Bad ai. ALL 4x games suffer from this to the extreme level. There to this date is no challenge ai in any 4x game. The devs try to tackle this issue by just letting the ai cheat recourses on higher difficulty levels, and even than it's still a pushover. Yet this games sickening fanbase will still pour 5000 hours into ho3 or stellaris or whatever purely playing ai.. How do they feel good doing that over and over again, are they fucked in the head? unemployed? trying to escape reality? The ai behav
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: It's raining outside
entry.content: What are some comfy games to play while it rains bros

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Question. I have a macbook air, and just bought a external disc drive so I can i…
entry.content: Question. I have a macbook air, and just bought a external disc drive so I can import a bunch of cd's/music. The storage is shit so I have a 1TB thumb drive that I will need to transfer all the music to. Then delete it, on my computer, as I go along. So, how? Say...one cd. Without thumb drive inserted, import cd to desktop, i assume itll be in a folder. Insert thumb drive, click and drag. Take out thumb drive, then delete files on my computer.....i might have just answered my own question. BUT I
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Librewolf deprecated on brew due to signing requirements
entry.content: brew reinstall librewolf ==> Would reinstall 1 cask: librewolf Warning: librewolf has been deprecated because it does not pass the macOS Gatekeeper check! It will be disabled on 2026-09-01. Why do they do this fucking bullshit to us? Apprently it's not enough to pay the Mac OS developer fee anymore and librewolf and the like are no longer kosher, so you have to do some fucking voodoo with the quarantine to use it. I know, I know >Mac OS >Homebrew >Found yer fuckin problem But still they have no
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How Does This Work?
entry.content: A rocket carries highly flammable and explosive fuel, by the tonnes. How is it that a lightning strike, that's millions of degrees, NOT cause a rocket to explode, when it goes through it? How are the people inside safe? Explain rocket tech.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: wtf do i do with this?
entry.content: hello gtards i bought this for nothing about a year ago, impulsively of course. atom n455 and 2 gigs of mem (upgraded), also has a ssd (made no speed difference). running mxlinux 32bit. is there a better distro? do i just switch it back to win 7 starter? also… any desktop streaming clients that still work on 32 bit? like moonlight? thanks and yes that is super sonico.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why in 2026 is font kerning still a problem?
entry.content: You'd think it'd be one of the first issues to be solved since the entire internet revolves around digitized text. Are we missing a universal standard in digital typeface rendering?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Lily Allen: It's Not Me It's You [Capitol, 2009] She is too a role model--for ch…
entry.content: Lily Allen: It's Not Me It's You [Capitol, 2009] She is too a role model--for chart queens, bohemians born-and-raised, and paparazzi victims everywhere. True, her synth-pop album debuted below India.Arie at five before its SoundScan swan dive. But even diving she's more graceful than most, and she has every expectation of popping out of the pool and climbing the ladder again, which is how her first one went gold. Here the modestly likable, oddly uncategorizable singer of Alright, Still emerges a
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I was kinda wooed when the free google chatbot fixed a powershell script I would…
entry.content: I was kinda wooed when the free google chatbot fixed a powershell script I would've been fucking with for an hour, admitedly a little unimportant thing but it made me wonder. Seriously how do codemonkeys cope with this baffling reality? That such a traditionally creative task as programming got successfully automated, before "boring", "suits", "bullshit jobs", "hr roasties" even? Every industry now tries it hardest to replace codemonkeys with a basically untested and untrusted chatbot because no
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Previous: >>109321765 NEW: https://huggingface.co/circlestone- labs/Anima Anima1.0 is out >UIs ComfyUI:https://github.com/comfyano nymous/ComfyUI SwarmUI:https://github.com/mcmonkey projects/SwarmUI KritaAI: https://github.com/Acly/krita-ai-di ffusion Forge Classic/Neo: https://github.com/Haoming02/sd-web ui-forge-classic >How to generate anime: image : https://rentry.org/comfyui_guide_1g irl video: https://rentry.org/wan22ldgguide >Style Explorers Anima: https://anima.mooshieblob.com/ | https:/
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: The Last of Old World Luxury
entry.content: They don't make 'em like they used to... at least not for us proletariat in the entry white-collar class. This isn't an economic discussion. When you get into a new luxury car it feels like tin by comparison, my dad had a 2000 bmw 740iL. I don't claim to know a lot about that car, but when i sat in the backseat I felt like I was in absolute first class. Real wood, leather, that big cabin, instead of some slop tablet new world order eye-tracking camera smartphone-mobile. I bought a volvo xc90 bec
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: SNES
entry.content: Out of every single console in existence, this one is just the best. The controller is amazing. The games are amazing. The graphics are amazing. The sound is amazing. The only issue I have is that it doesn't play NES carts, but it can play gameboy carts with the super gameboy. But still, amazing system. Easily the best.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
